user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of salary slabs with their name, employee class specificity and slab range, so that I can review the configured compensation metrics
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Compensation screen; When the page loads; Then I see each slab listed with Slab name, Employee class specific and Slab range (₹) columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new salary metric, so that I can define additional compensation slabs
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Compensation screen; When I click Add new salary metrics and enter the details; Then a new salary slab is created and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing salary slab, so that I can keep slab ranges and settings up to date
acceptance_criteria: Given a slab is listed on the Compensation screen; When I click Edit and change its values; Then the updated slab is saved and reflected in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the accepted difference between provided salary and calculated salary, so that minor salary discrepancies are tolerated during processing
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Compensation screen; When I enter a value for the accepted difference; Then the configuration is saved and applied to salary calculations

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my compensation configuration using Save or Save & Next, so that I can persist changes and continue configuring related settings
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made changes on the Compensation screen; When I click Save or Save & Next; Then my changes are persisted and I proceed accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to navigate between the Compensation, Expense Head and Rehire Settings tabs, so that I can configure all compensation-related areas in one place
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Compensation screen; When I select the Expense Head or Rehire Settings tab; Then the corresponding configuration section is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh and page through the slab list, so that I can see the latest data across multiple entries
acceptance_criteria: Given the slab list is displayed; When I click Refresh or use the pagination control; Then the list reloads and shows the current set of slabs

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel my changes, so that I can discard edits I no longer want to keep
acceptance_criteria: Given I have unsaved changes on the Compensation screen; When I click Cancel; Then my changes are discarded and the previous state is retained
